$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json config validate --offline --config-dir <DATA_DIR>/missing-config
exit: 1
stdout:
stderr:
Error: main.pkl not found in <DATA_DIR>/missing-config: stat <DATA_DIR>/missing-config/main.pkl: no such file or directory
Usage:
  switchyard config validate [flags]

Flags:
      --config-dir string    config directory to validate (default: <data-dir>/config)
      --drivers-dir string   drivers directory to scan (default: <data-dir>/drivers)
  -h, --help                 help for validate
      --offline              validate locally without connecting to the daemon

Global Flags:
      --data-dir string    data directory (default "<DEFAULT_DATA_DIR>")
      --endpoint string    API endpoint (unix:///path or tcp://host:port)
      --format string      auto|table|json|yaml (default "auto")
      --log-level string   error|warn|info|debug (default "warn")
      --no-color           disable ANSI color
  -v, --verbose            --log-level=debug shortcut

main.pkl not found in <DATA_DIR>/missing-config: stat <DATA_DIR>/missing-config/main.pkl: no such file or directory
